name: Pizza Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to bread machine in order listed.
2. Select pizza dough cycle and start the machine.
3. Machine will mix, knead, and rise the dough automatically.
4. It will then shape the dough into a loaf and bake it until done.
5. Let the bread cool before slicing and serving. Enjoy with Paul Prudhomme's Hot and Sweet Pizza and Pasta Magic sauce if desired.
